search_queries_used: site:nice.org.uk NG238 lipid annual medication review full lipid profile adherence adverse effects
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic statin choice, intensity or dose
automatic diagnosis, investigation, treatment, medication, dose, procedure, referral, escalation, or discharge instructions
search snippets, landing pages, and broad source-family matches without an exact applicable section
rejection_reasons: Risk and diagnosis require complete clinician assessment.
No medicine, dose or treatment change is generated.
Autonomous clinical output is outside this documentation-only research programme and was not mapped.
Only opened exact official documents and directly applicable sections were accepted as evidence.
population_applicability: Adults receiving lipid-disorder or lipid-lowering-treatment review; pregnancy, children and inherited disorders require specialist pathways.
setting_applicability: Primary or specialist outpatient lipid follow-up.
UAE_applicability: NICE domains transfer partially; UAE risk tools, laboratory ranges, prescribing, formulary and specialist pathways govern.
recency_verification: Current NICE NG238 recommendations were reviewed on 2026-07-14.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact response and annual-review section supports interval change, relevant symptoms, patient goals, clinician-reviewed lipid results, entered plan and follow-up without changing lipid therapy.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinician-documented adherence, adverse-effect review, lifestyle and cardiovascular risk discussion, repeat lipid and liver testing, annual medication review, and agreed follow-up without mapping doses.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact lipid assessment section supports measured weight and focused risk or endocrine assessment only when performed; it does not calculate risk or assign familial dyslipidaemia.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports full lipid profile, blood pressure, BMI, diabetes status, renal function, liver transaminases, thyroid context, muscle symptoms, and clinician-led specialist assessment.

unresolved_source_gaps: Lipid values, family history, secondary causes, cardiovascular history, medicine, adherence, adverse effects, risk calculation, diagnosis and treatment remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
